title: centunculus minimus var. simplex
intro: Centunculus minimus var. simplex, also known as the lesser meadow rue or lesser meadow saxifrage, is a flowering plant that belongs to the saxifrage family. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antiseptic effects, which can help to soothe skin irritations and wounds. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, such as reducing fever, relieving pain, and promoting digestion, although more research is needed to confirm these effects. Herbal preparations of Centunculus minimus var. simplex include infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be used to make teas, salves, and other remedies.
